Task description: 'Create a product comparison slide for "CloudDrive" plans.' CloudDrive is a real product (cloud storage management tool) but pricing tiers (10GB Basic, 1TB Pro) do not match any real CloudDrive offering.
File extension in expected_output_path and verifier.py imports zipfile to parse ODP structure
Task description: 'Insert a table with 3 columns and 5 rows.' Header + 4 data rows

privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a LibreOffice Impress presentation with a product comparison table for a fictional CloudDrive service. The presentation must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/Presentations/comparison.odp in ODP format. The table has 3 columns and 5 rows with headers (Feature, Basic Plan, Pro Plan) and four feature rows (Storage, Encryption, Support, Offline Access). Basic Plan offers 10 GB storage, no encryption, email support, and no offline access; Pro Plan offers 1 TB storage, encryption, 24/7 phone support, and offline access. All 'No' entries must be colored red, all 'Yes' entries must be colored green, and the Basic/Pro plan columns must be center-aligned. All required strings (14 total) match the task specification exactly. The data is fully synthetic with no external source.
